design_prompt.label: Design brief
design_prompt.meta_prompt:
You are looking at a screenshot and markdown extract of a business's current website. Write a short design brief (3-5 sentences) for creating a website for the business. 

Include:
- Who they are (business's name, type etc.)
- What they do/sell
- What design and feeling the website should give, based on the screenshot. Include accent color, but ONLY if it is very clear in the screenshot
- Very short resume of what features the page has (eg. payment, ordering table, opening times, etc.) ONLY include these if it is not a super basic feature that every page has

DO NOT mention specific copy, product names, addresses, contact details, or other literal page content.

Example breif:
"Create the website for a Sejers Konditori
Sejers Konditori is an artisanal bakery, confectionery, and cafe that specializes in fresh-baked breads, celebratory cakes, and homemade treats.
It should have a cozy, warm, but also scandinavien design
Key features include organized product category portfolios, an integrated customer testimonial widget, and dedicated sections for their various physical locations."

website_overview.label: Website overview
website_overview.meta_prompt: You are looking at the markdown extract of a business website. Give me all the information of it. Opening times, contact details, products, etc.

ai_subpages.label: Ai Subpages
ai_subpages.meta_prompt: You are looking at the markdown extract of a business website. Identify the most important subpages or sections a reader should open to learn about the business (e.g. hours, contact, menu, booking, products, locations). For each item, give a short human-readable name and one line on what information that page likely contains. Prefer paths or labels implied by the markdown; if unknown, infer from context. Order by usefulness. Skip generic pages that add nothing beyond the home view.

subpages.description: Important subpages or sections to visit for key site information

name.description: Nav label, heading, or short title for the subpage or section

path_or_hint.description: URL path, slug, or hint from markdown if present; empty string if unknown

summary.description: One line: what the user learns there (hours, contact, products, etc.)

desgin_search_queries.label: Desgin Search Queries
desgin_search_queries.meta_prompt: I wanna build a new and improved design for this website. Give me a few search queries to find examples of simular websites

visuel_rating.label: Visuel Rating
visuel_rating.meta_prompt:
You are looking at a screenshot of a website. Rate it from 1-10 based on how visually appealing it is. 

respond with just the number from 1-10
